means.idiom-jp: とても〜にはかなわない
means.example-sentence: I was no match for Makoto at Japanese chess, and he beat me in three games in a row.
means.sentence-jp: 私は将棋ではとてもマコトにはかなわず、彼は3局連続して私を打ち負かした。

notes: be more than a match for ~ で書き換えることができる。例: I was no match for Makoto. = Makoto was more than a match for me.
